/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/stock_for_cpp.dir/main.cpp.o -o stock_for_cpp  libconfig_lib.a libscheduler_lib.a libcore_lib.a liblog_lib.a libnetwork_lib.a libdata_lib.a libanalysis_lib.a libutils_lib.a thirdparty/spdlog/libspdlog.a -lsqlite3 thirdparty/ta-lib/libta-lib.a -framework CFNetwork -framework CoreFoundation libconfig_lib.a libcore_lib.a libanalysis_lib.a thirdparty/ta-lib/libta-lib.a libutils_lib.a /opt/homebrew/lib/libssl.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libcrypto.dylib liblog_lib.a thirdparty/spdlog/libspdlog.a
